description: S3 DAG example: council pattern — question → 2 parallel critics → synthesis. Tests parallel fan-out + merge fan-in. Real-world use case: multi-perspective decision eval.

stages.prompt: Analyze this decision question and present the core trade-off: {topic}
You are a Skeptic. Challenge the assumptions and identify the biggest risk in this analysis. Be concise (2-3 sentences). Analysis: {question.output}
You are a Pragmatist. Focus on shipping speed and real-world execution. What is the simplest path forward? Be concise (2-3 sentences). Analysis: {question.output}

cases.topic: should a small team adopt microservices or stay with a monolith?
should we pause feature work for 2 weeks to pay down technical debt?
should we build an in-house analytics dashboard or buy an off-the-shelf solution?
